description: (8) 10G RJ45 PoE++ ports, (2) 10G SFP+ ports, 155W PoE budget, Layer 3 management

detailed_description.heading: Enterprise-Grade Connectivity
detailed_description.text: The Ubiquiti UniFi Switch Pro XG 8 PoE is a high-performance managed switch designed for professional and enterprise networks. It features (8) 10G RJ45 ports with PoE++ support and (2) 10G SFP+ ports, providing versatile connectivity for high-bandwidth devices such as access points, servers, and workstations. With a total PoE budget of 155W, it can simultaneously power multiple devices, eliminating the need for separate power adapters. Supporting Layer 3 management, the switch enables advanced networking configurations, including VLAN segmentation, static routing, and link aggregation, offering flexible control over network traffic. Its Etherlighting™ technology provides visual feedback of port activity, link speed, and VLAN assignment, making cable management and troubleshooting simpler. With a switching capacity of 200 Gbps and non-blocking throughput of 100 Gbps, it ensures fast, uninterrupted data transfer across all ports. This combination of speed, PoE support, and advanced features makes it ideal for enterprises seeking reliable, high-capacity network infrastructure.

detailed_description.heading: Professional Design
detailed_description.text: Designed for ease of deployment and professional environments, the USW-Pro-XG-8-PoE comes in a compact desktop and wall-mountable form factor. Its sturdy construction ensures durability for continuous operation in offices, server rooms, and other professional settings. The switch includes Etherlighting™ port indicators that make identifying connections and network status quick and intuitive, even in racks or low-light conditions. It supports up to 1,000 VLANs, a MAC address table of 32,000 entries, and a 2 MB packet buffer, ensuring smooth handling of complex networks and large data flows. With Layer 3 functionality, administrators can optimize traffic routing and reduce network congestion, improving efficiency. Its 149 Mpps forwarding rate ensures high-speed packet delivery, supporting demanding applications such as video streaming, VoIP, and cloud computing. The device is energy-efficient, compact, and easy to integrate into any professional IT setup, offering both flexibility and reliable performance.

detailed_description.heading: Stable Operation
detailed_description.text: The UniFi Switch Pro XG 8 PoE is built to deliver stable and uninterrupted performance for enterprise networks. Its PoE++ ports provide flexible power delivery, allowing simultaneous operation of multiple network devices without external adapters. The switch supports high-speed connectivity over both copper and fiber uplinks, ensuring redundancy and reliable data transfer for critical infrastructure. Management is centralized via UniFi Network Controller software, enabling real-time monitoring, configuration, and firmware updates from a single interface. The compact and robust design allows installation in desktops, walls, or network racks, providing professional deployment options. With total non-blocking throughput of 100 Gbps and advanced Layer 3 routing capabilities, the switch ensures efficient handling of multiple high-bandwidth streams. Combining high-speed performance, PoE support, and intelligent management features, the USW-Pro-XG-8-PoE is an ideal solution for businesses and enterprises requiring scalable, reliable, and professional-grade networking equipment.
